body:
SDI: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/2999

This PR consolidates the key changes required to run ClimaAtmos in LES configurations. This links the changes in ClimaCore [PR#1736](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/1736) to updates in parameterized tendencies in ClimaAtmos.
title: LES experiments in ClimaAtmos
